creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-03-05 04:16:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/codeigniter      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/codeigniter/files pkg-message.in 
  Added files:
    www/codeigniter/files pkg-message-apache.in 
                          pkg-message-noapache.in 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.6.1
  - Found all of the CI files that could be modified by the user and
    install .sample versions of each
  - Add an informational message when a user-editable config file is
    modified and the port is deinstalled (e.g. the file is preserved)
  - Display different pkg-message depending on WITH_APACHE knob
  
  PR:             ports/121358
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin@sourcehosting.net> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +66 -10    ports/www/codeigniter/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/www/codeigniter/distinfo
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/www/codeigniter/files/pkg-message-apache.in (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/www/codeigniter/files/pkg-message-noapache.in (new)
  1.2       +0 -15     ports/www/codeigniter/files/pkg-message.in
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/www/codeigniter/pkg-descr
  1.2       +61 -18    ports/www/codeigniter/pkg-plist
